item.title: LEIDEN API v0.0.5.10
item.description:
Product: LEIDEN API v0.0.5.10
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Thu, 05 Mar 2026 20:00:25 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Tools used by LevyLab to interact with Leiden Cryostats

Front Panel (FP) API:
- pushButton({Start, 3He, 4He, Normal, Recovery, Auto, Reset, LED Test})
- setMode({Auto Off, Start, Condense 3He, Condense 4He, Normal Circulation, Recovery})
- getMode()

Temperature Control (TC) API:
- getTemperature()
- setHeater()
- getHeater()

Release Notes: - build with Remote-Control-ZMQ/1.3.6.27
- fix API handling getTemperature and getHeater
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: LEIDEN API v0.0.5.9
item.description:
Product: LEIDEN API v0.0.5.9
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Thu, 05 Mar 2026 19:38:09 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Tools used by LevyLab to interact with Leiden Cryostats

Front Panel (FP) API:
- pushButton({Start, 3He, 4He, Normal, Recovery, Auto, Reset, LED Test})
- setMode({Auto Off, Start, Condense 3He, Condense 4He, Normal Circulation, Recovery})
- getMode()

Temperature Control (TC) API:
- getTemperature()
- setHeater()
- getHeater()

Release Notes: - build with Remote-Control-ZMQ/1.3.6.27
- fix API handling getTemperature and getHeater
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Oxford-VRM v1.10.4.27
item.description:
Product: Oxford-VRM v1.10.4.27
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Thu, 05 Mar 2026 15:20:58 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: VIs for controlling the Oxford VRM PS that controls the CF900's 3D magnet

Release Notes: - build with Remote-Control-ZMQ/1.3.7.28
- #16 fix HELP
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: Oxford-1820 v1.6.5.26

Release Notes: - build with Remote-Control-ZMQ/1.3.7.28
- #22 fix HELP
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: Transport v2.3.1.43
item.description:
Product: Transport v2.3.1.43
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Mon, 02 Mar 2026 17:47:46 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: VIs for scripting and performing transport measurments.

[Control Experiment]
- Control Experiment.vi
- provides a uniform way to record information about your sample & device
- record how the lockin is connected to the device
- configure the Krohn Hite amplifier
- set the base path for saving data
- configure peripheral instruments
- APIs for recording sample data, instrument status

[Transport]
Basic transport measurments:
- Lockin vs time (Lockin_time.vi)
- Lockin Sweep Mode (Lockin_sweep.vi)

[Transport Server]
Server used for scripting and performing asynchronous transport measurments.


Release Notes: [2.3.1]
- fix an issue in which instruments would not be compared correctly on second iteration when Lockin_Sweep or Lockin_time are called as a subVI
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: RemoteControl.ZMQ v1.3.7.28
item.description:
Product: RemoteControl.ZMQ v1.3.7.28
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Mon, 02 Mar 2026 16:18:49 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Override library implementing ZMQ lazy pirate reliable request reply (RRR) protocal using RemoteControl SMO framework.

Release Notes: [1.3.6]
#190 add recursive create folder
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Multichannel Lockin v3.3.3.72
item.description:
Product: Multichannel Lockin v3.3.3.72
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Thu, 26 Feb 2026 12:06:30 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Multichannel Lockin for National Instruments' Dynamic Signal Acquisition hardware (4431, 4461, 4462).
- This version is configured to handle multiple cards for simultaneous, synchronized AI/AO.
- The analog outputs can be configured to output sine, square, sawtooth, or triangle functions with (swept) DC offsets.
- Each of the analog inputs can be demodulated at multiple frequencies.

Release Notes: - build with Remote-Control-ZMQ/1.3.6.27
item.dc:creator: LevyLab
